problem_text_cn: 3-3 质量同为$m$的两个小球，用长$2l$轻绳连接后静放在光滑水平面上，绳处于伸直状态，如图3-2所示。今用恒力$F$作用于绳的中央，$F$方向水平且垂直于绳的初始长度方向，两球因此运动。试问在两球第一次相碰前的瞬间，小球在垂直于$F$作用线方向上的分速度$v_{\perp}$为多大？
problem_text_en: 3-3 Two balls of equal mass $m$ are connected by a light string of length $2l$ and initially rest on a smooth horizontal plane with the string stretched straight, as shown in Figure 3-2. A constant force $F$ is applied perpendicularly to the string's initial length direction at its midpoint, causing both balls to move. Determine the perpendicular component of velocity $v_{\perp}$ of each ball just before their first collision.
problem_solution_cn:
解 系统位形如图3-3所示时，绳中张力
$$ T = \frac{F}{2 \cos \phi}, $$
小球受绳拉力也为$T$，沿$F$方向的分力为
$$ T_{x} = T \cos \phi = \frac{F}{2}, $$
小球获得该方向匀加速度
$$ a_{x} = \frac{T_{x}}{m} = \frac{F}{2 m}. $$
两球第一次碰撞前瞬间，小球在此方向上速度设已达$v_{\text{移}}$，$F$作用点已经过的位移量设为$s$，小球在$F$方向位移量对应地为$s-l$，则有
$$ v_{\text{移}} = \sqrt{2 a_{x}(s - l)} = \sqrt{F(s - l)/m}, $$
$F$作功量已达$Fs$，故有
$$ Fs = 2 \times \frac{1}{2} m(v_{\text{移}}^{2} + v_{\perp}^{2}), $$
解得
$$ v_{\perp} = \sqrt{\frac{F l}{m}}. $$
problem_solution_en:
Solution When the system configuration is as shown in Figure 3-3, the tension in the string is
$$ T = \frac{F}{2 \cos \phi}, $$
The force exerted by the string on each ball is also $T$, and its component along the $F$ direction is
$$ T_{x} = T \cos \phi = \frac{F}{2}, $$
The ball acquires a constant acceleration in that direction:
$$ a_{x} = \frac{T_{x}}{m} = \frac{F}{2 m}. $$
Just before the first collision, let the speed of each ball in this direction be $v_{\text{移}}$. The displacement of the point of application of $F$ is denoted by $s$, and the corresponding displacement of each ball in the $F$ direction is $s-l$. Then
$$ v_{\text{移}} = \sqrt{2 a_{x}(s - l)} = \sqrt{F(s - l)/m}, $$
The work done by $F$ is $Fs$, so
$$ Fs = 2 \times \frac{1}{2} m(v_{\text{移}}^{2} + v_{\perp}^{2}), $$
solving for $v_{\perp}$ gives
$$ v_{\perp} = \sqrt{\frac{F l}{m}}. $$
img_cn: 图946_1展示了一道物理题。题目是“3-3 质量同为$m$的两个小球，用长$2l$轻绳连接后静放在光滑水平面上，绳处于伸直状态，如图3-2所示。今用恒力$F$作用于绳的中央，$F$方向水平且垂直于绳的初始长度方向，两球因此运动。试问在两球第一次相碰前的瞬间，小球在垂直于$F$作用线方向上的分速度$v_{\perp}$为多大？”图中包含一张图3-2示意图，图中显示两小球用轻绳连接，初始时绳子水平伸直，力$F$从绳的中点竖直向上。解题过程在图中呈现，包括对张力$T$、分力$T_x$、加速度$a_x$的推导，以及利用能量守恒最终得到$v_{\perp} = \sqrt{Fl/m}$。
img_en: Figure 946_1 displays a physics problem. The text reads: “3-3 Two balls of equal mass $m$ are connected by a light string of length $2l$ and initially rest on a smooth horizontal plane with the string stretched straight, as shown in Figure 3-2. A constant force $F$ is applied perpendicularly to the string's initial length direction at its midpoint, causing both balls to move. Determine the perpendicular component of velocity $v_{\perp}$ of each ball just before their first collision.” A schematic diagram (Figure 3-2) shows two balls connected by a light string; initially the string is straight and horizontal. Force $F$ acts vertically upward at the midpoint of the string. The solution process is also shown, including derivation of tension $T$, component $T_x$, acceleration $a_x$, and applying energy conservation to obtain $v_{\perp} = \sqrt{Fl/m}$.
